issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent's attack phase), not 'OnAttacked' (when this card is attacked). Card activates during opponent's attack, not when attacked.
Missing condition: 'LeaderHasType' with type '{Water Seven}'. DSL must verify Leader has Water Seven type before power boost applies.
Target should allow Leader OR Character ('ChooseOwnLeaderOrCharacter'), not just Character. Effect text says 'up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards'.
Condition should use 'HasAttachedDon' not 'HasRestingDon' - the −1 DON cost suggests attached DON on field/leader, not resting DON in deck zone. Clarify based on game mechanics.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] DON!! −1: If your Leader has the {Water Seven} type, up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this battle.
